constraints.message: Every claim must carry a non-null grounding record (provenance is mandatory).
constraints.evaluation_note: Provenance gate: a claim without grounding cannot participate in the deliberation DAG.

constraints.message: Claims must form a valid DAG keyed by claim_id with edges through grounding.artifact_id and grounding.claim_id (no cycles, no dangling references, depth bounded).
constraints.evaluation_note: Reuses the is_valid_dag builtin (FR-C1). Edge fields use the dot-path form; extract_path resolves nested grounding references uniformly across runners.

constraints.message: tool_output groundings must carry a canonical sha256:<64-hex> output_hash (length 71).
constraints.evaluation_note: Length 71 = len('sha256:') + 64 hex chars. Pattern is also enforced at the schema layer via ClaimGroundingSchema.output_hash; this rule is the cross-runner conformance check.

constraints.message: Speculative claims require panel routing; auto-honor and auto-reject paths cannot carry speculative confidence.
constraints.evaluation_note: Confidence-vs-routing coupling: a speculative claim must reach a panel deliberation, never a fast path.

constraints.message: acknowledged_judgment groundings must carry a non-null source (AgentIdentity) and a non-empty justification.
constraints.evaluation_note: Acknowledged judgments record human or agent subjective input; source attribution and rationale are required for audit reconstruction.
